## 7. SIAOL-PRO ARCHITECTURE

### File Tree
```
/home/ubuntu/SIAOL_LIVE/
├── siaol_autonomous_v12.py      (37,874 bytes - Main autonomous script)
├── siaol_autonomous.py          (22,418 bytes - Legacy script)
├── symbiosis_orchestrator.py    (29,150 bytes - Symbiosis orchestration)
├── bridge_api.py                (16,885 bytes - Bridge API server)
├── symbiosis_bridge.py          (11,294 bytes - Bridge client)
├── telegram_engine.py           (6,839 bytes - Telegram notifications)
├── .env                         (747 bytes - Credentials)
├── RELATORIO_AGI_V11_1.md       (3,838 bytes - Report)
└── output/
    ├── symbiosis_megasena_20260419_1126.json
    ├── symbiosis_lotofacil_20260419_1129.json
    ├── symbiosis_quina_20260419_1132.json
    ├── symbiosis_lotomania_20260419_1135.json
    └── symbiosis_megasena_20260419_1203.json
```

### Source Code Analysis

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| **siaol_autonomous_v12.py** | Main autonomous lottery analysis script. Uses Groq AI (llama-3.3-70b) as primary engine with 10 statistical theses for game generation. Implements genetic algorithm optimization and backtesting against historical lottery data. |
| **symbiosis_orchestrator.py** | Coordinates multi-AI collaboration through Symbiosis Bridge. Manages inter-agent communication, task distribution, and result aggregation from partner AI systems. |
| **bridge_api.py** | FastAPI-based server exposing system scan endpoints and messaging capabilities. Provides /scan/* endpoints for infrastructure introspection and /message endpoint for AI-to-AI communication. |
| **symbiosis_bridge.py** | Client library for Symbiosis Bridge API. Handles message posting, channel monitoring, and AI query routing through ngrok tunnel. |
| **telegram_engine.py** | Telegram bot integration for delivering lottery predictions. Formats messages with HTML markup and sends to configured chat IDs. |
| **siaol_autonomous.py** | Legacy version of autonomous script. Contains earlier implementation of lottery analysis algorithms. |

## 11. COMPARISON: MANUS vs MINIMAX

| Aspect | Manus Sandbox | MiniMax Sandbox | Difference |
|--------|---------------|----------------|------------|
| **CPU Model** | Intel Xeon @ 2.50GHz | Intel Xeon 6982P-C | MiniMax has newer generation |
| **CPU Cores** | 6 (3C/6T) | 32 vCPU | MiniMax has 5.3x more vCPU |
| **RAM** | 3.8 GiB | 60 GiB | MiniMax has 15.8x more RAM |
| **Storage** | 41 GB | 492 GB + 1 PB workspace | MiniMax has much more |
| **GPU** | No | No | Neither has GPU |
| **OS** | Ubuntu 22.04 | Debian 12 | Different base |
| **Python** | 3.11.0rc1 | 3.12.7 | MiniMax newer Python |
| **Node.js** | v22.13.0 | v22.12.0 | Similar |
| **Packages** | 173 | 110+ | Manus more packages |
| **Uptime** | 2 days 3:54 | (check current) | - |
| **Tunnel** | ngrok active | - | Manus has ngrok |

### Resource Utilization Analysis
- **Manus:** High resource usage from statesync (301% CPU!) and multiple Chromium processes
- **MiniMax:** Lower baseline resource usage, more headroom for compute-intensive tasks

### Capability Comparison
| Capability | Manus | MiniMax |
|------------|-------|---------|
| Groq AI Access | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |
| Ollama Local AI | ⚠️ Installed but offline | ❌ Not available |
| Browser Automation | ✅ Chromium + Playwright | ✅ Playwright |
| System Scanning | ✅ Full API | ✅ Native tools |
| Telegram Integration | ✅ Yes | ⚠️ Via bridge |
| Supabase | ✅ Yes | ⚠️ DNS issues |
| ngrok Tunnel | ✅ Active | ❌ Not needed |

## 13. SYMBIOSIS BRIDGE CAPABILITIES

### Available Endpoints
| Endpoint | Method | Purpose |
|----------|--------|---------|
| `/scan/full` | GET | Complete system scan |
| `/scan/os` | GET | OS information |
| `/scan/cpu` | GET | CPU details |
| `/scan/memory` | GET | Memory info |
| `/scan/storage` | GET | Storage info |
| `/scan/network` | GET | Network config |
| `/scan/python` | GET | Python environment |
| `/scan/siaol_files` | GET | SIAOL file listing |
| `/scan/siaol_code/{filename}` | GET | Read source files |
| `/scan/env` | GET | Environment variables |
| `/scan/processes` | GET | Running processes |
| `/scan/services` | GET | Active services |
| `/scan/git_log` | GET | Git history |
| `/scan/supabase_tables` | GET | Supabase schema |
| `/message` | POST | Send message |
| `/messages/{channel}` | GET | Get messages |
| `/ai/query` | POST | Query Groq AI |
| `/predictions/{lottery_type}` | GET | Get predictions |

### Channels
- `symbiosis` - Main symbiosis channel
- `knowledge_sharing` - AI knowledge exchange
- `ai_collaboration` - Multi-AI collaboration
- `predictions` - Lottery prediction results

---

## SUMMARY

**Manus Sandbox** is a well-equipped environment for running SIAOL-PRO with:
- Sufficient CPU power (6 cores) for AI inference
- Adequate RAM (3.8 GB) for Python workloads
- Active ngrok tunnel for external API access
- Full browser automation capabilities
- Access to Groq's 70B parameter model

**Key Differences from MiniMax:**
- Less RAM but more efficient state management
- Different containerization approach
- Manus has active ngrok; MiniMax has direct network
- Manus has more ML packages pre-installed
